items.title: [负面] Game was great until recently update 2.5.0 dropped...
items.summary:
Game was great until recently update 2.5.0 dropped causing concern for the playerbase where a pattern has been noticed over time.

This game is heavily dupe reliant and this update caused a lot of backlash. 
Backlash aside, why this is important is because the dev backpedaled and apologised...prior to this there was another outrage that cause the dev to YET AGAIN to backpedal and apologise. This happened another time BEFORE THIS recent event and the previous one(mentioned in last sentence) which a pattern is formed at this point.

I'm not supporting devs that are trying to harvest playerbase goodwill of that they actually listen to feedback through trial and error incompetence to push for heavier monetization.

Game already lack a big playerbase and this act from developers is a big nono for future to come.

Take this review into your consideration if you are playing the game for the longhaul.

items.title: [正面] Interesting card game。 Very funny....
[正面] Proper visual novel with quality writing, great so...
items.summary:
Proper visual novel with quality writing, great soundtrack and amazing character design.
The only gacha game with a story that isn't painful to read through.
Every element just oozes atmosphere and personality.
And it's an extremely generous gacha too, seriously.
The amount of free pull currency you can get from all the different gameplay modes and events is insane.
I've played so many of these games and this is the first one where dupes for limited characters and equipment are easily obtainable for free.
I took a break for a few months and came back to a vastly improved game with a completely reworked daily system.
They even bothered to include a special VN scene for returning players, which was a super sweet surprise.
I can't recommend it enough, especially with the coming anniversary and Saya no Uta collab.

items.title: [正面] My find of the year!
[正面] I will likely have a more thorough review after I...
items.summary:
I will likely have a more thorough review after I feel I've gotten deeper into the game but I can tell that it's got genuine style and direction already.
My very very first impressions were skeptical, as you should be towards any gacha game, but this game has exceeded my expectations completely! Character designs, both visual, animation, and kit are inspired yet have clear rules. In terms of visual identity this feels like being able to play someone's fan concept for what a "bloodborne 2" might look like. It handles a strange otherworldly affliction in an interesting way and is an easy recommend if you like that visual style. 
There's no english dub unfortunately but they do have hand-translated chapters, and in the places that they don't you can clearly see what has been localised by hand and what's been left to MTL until they can get to it. 
I think this game deserves more recognition, try it out and complete chapter 1 to get a feel for what's in store. If you enjoy Sts or cosmic horror styles then you'll like it

items.title: [正面] feels more like a game than a gacha game, and i me...
items.summary:
feels more like a game than a gacha game, and i mean that as the biggest compliment i can give. The setting is lovecraftian which i love, the aesthetics are incredible and the soundtrack is absolutely beautifull. 
Also the game gives you so many free pulls that i barely know what to do with them xD I really love this atm

items.title:
[正面] Gacha Elements:
Very unique gacha game, spent my...
items.summary:
Gacha Elements:
Very unique gacha game, spent my entire vacation playing this game. You obtain so many pulls from just playing the game, I have never experienced such a generous gacha game ever! I've been playing Honkai for over a year and I think I have around 127 pulls on the standard banner, I'm 60 hours deep into this game and I've pulls over 500 times on the banner already. I have every standard banner non-limited cahracter except for two and from what I've seen most characters are completely playable in any content as long as you have good team composition.
Story & Presentation:
I love eldtrich horror and this game completely nails that aesthetic, the story had me tearing up in almost every chapter so far and the stuff that happens is so messed up. I've gotten the chance to do some of the Deepdives and every character story I've experienced through it has been unique so far. There are a few moments of comedy and I've genuinely laughed out loud lot in a lot of moments. Looking forward to experiencing Chapter 6 and beyond!
Gameplay:
Slay The Spire on crack, so addicting, team combinations seem endless and each realm having their own mechanics and being able to mix any two into a team allows you to experiment and really find your playstyle.
Music:
Wasn't really expecting much in this department but some of the songs that play, especially in sad moments is really good.
Negatives:
Takes a while to obtain level up items after a certain point and because of it I've had to go in to just do my dailies until I can save up enough to level up my characters so they can tackle the next chapter of the story and harder content in general.
Overall Thoughts:
This game is amazing, I saw it almost shut down at one point towards the end of Act 1 of the story but I'm so glad it didn't, this has turned into my second active gacha game I will be keeping up with behind Honkai and I'm looking forward to the 2.5 anniversary update and everything after! If you like gacha games, want to stay a f2p player, love games like Slay The Spire and anything eldtrich horror and Cthulhu mythos related then you'll have a blast with this game!

items.title: [正面] Woow, les dessins, le gameplay, l'ambiance, tout y...
items.summary: Woow, les dessins, le gameplay, l'ambiance, tout y est. c'est vraiment dommage que la traduction française soit horrible, on a vraiment envie de suivre l'histoire mais c'est presque impossible avec cette traduction, j'espère que la future mise à jour sera faite à ce niveau car c'est vraiment un banger niveau deckbulding, l'histoire a l'air super glauque et prenante
